docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY JACKSON, SHERRY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCO, HECTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, SHERRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANCO, HECTOR $2,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,245.00, DEFENDANT HECTOR FRANCO NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
